use_cases: E-commerce product search with category filtering
Content management system search with taxonomy filters
Directory or listing site search with type selection
Knowledge base search with topic categorization
ai_summary: A search input component integrated with category selection dropdown, allowing users to filter search results by predefined categories. Built with Radix UI Slot and CVA for variant support, featuring a modular button component with multiple visual styles including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants. Designed for flexible platform integration across SaaS and e-commerce applications.
